title: Prediction Model Test Coverage & Hardening
rationale: readiness_v2.py (556 lines) and override_predictor.py (552 lines) have ZERO test coverage. These are ML models that directly influence trading gate decisions — highest-risk untested code in Aura.

stories.title: ReadinessModelV2: Feature encoding and V1 fallback tests
stories.description: Test ReadinessTrainingSample.to_feature_vector() produces correct 10-dimensional vector with non-linear and interaction terms. Test V1 fallback path when model is untrained.
acceptance: to_feature_vector() returns exactly 10 floats
Non-linear features (squared) are mathematically correct
Interaction features (emotional*cognitive, stress*override) are correct
compute_score() uses V1 weights when _trained is False
V1 contributions sum correctly
Default component values used for missing keys

stories.title: ReadinessModelV2: Training, early stopping, and R² computation
stories.description: Test that train() produces valid weights, early stopping fires on convergence/divergence, R² is computed correctly, and insufficient data returns error.
acceptance: train() with < min_samples returns error dict
train() with sufficient samples sets _trained=True
R² is between 0 and 1 for well-behaved data
Early stopping (convergence) triggers before max_epochs on easy data
Training metrics include epochs_run, early_stop_reason, weights
Feature means/stds are computed correctly after training
stories.notes: 7 tests in TestUS251Training — all pass. Also tests auto-train on buffer reaching min_samples.

stories.title: ReadinessModelV2: OOD detection and prediction bounds
stories.description: Test that _predict() detects out-of-distribution features (|z| > 3σ) and blends prediction towards 0.5. Test compute_score() output is always in [0, 100].
acceptance: Normal features produce unblended prediction
OOD features (beyond 3σ) trigger blending towards 0.5
compute_score() output is clamped to [0, 100] for extreme inputs
OOD detection uses correct feature names in log
stories.notes: 4 tests in TestUS252OODAndBounds — all pass. Tests both trained and untrained clamping.

stories.title: ReadinessModelV2: Save/load roundtrip and buffer persistence
stories.description: Test model save/load preserves weights, bias, means, stds, trained status. Test training buffer save/load roundtrip.
acceptance: Saved model can be loaded with identical weights/bias
Feature means/stds survive roundtrip
Training buffer survives save/load roundtrip
Feature count mismatch on load is handled gracefully
Missing model file on load doesn't crash
stories.notes: 7 tests in TestUS253Persistence — all pass. Also tests get_model_info() and get_weight_comparison().

stories.title: OverridePredictor: Feature encoding, sigmoid, and enum warnings
stories.description: Test _encode_features() maps known/unknown enums correctly, _sigmoid() is numerically stable, and US-239 warnings fire for unknown enums.
acceptance: _encode_features() produces exactly 8 floats
Known emotional states map to correct risk values
Known cognitive loads map to correct risk values
Unknown enums default to documented values (0.0 or 0.15)
US-239 warnings fire once per unknown value (dedup by set)
_sigmoid(0) = 0.5, _sigmoid(large_pos) ≈ 1.0, _sigmoid(large_neg) ≈ 0.0
_sigmoid handles both positive and negative overflow without math error
stories.notes: 17 tests in TestUS254FeatureEncoding. BUG FOUND: US-239 emotional_state dedup checked raw value instead of prefixed key — fixed in override_predictor.py line 180.

stories.title: OverridePredictor: Training, prediction, risk levels, and OOD
stories.description: Test fit() trains on synthetic data, predict_loss_probability() returns valid OverridePrediction, risk level classification is correct, and OOD detection works.
acceptance: fit() with < 5 events returns error dict
fit() with sufficient events sets _trained=True and returns metrics
predict_loss_probability() returns OverridePrediction with all fields
Risk levels map correctly: <0.5=low, 0.5-0.65=moderate, 0.65-0.8=high, ≥0.8=critical
Untrained model uses heuristic fallback prediction
OOD features (>3σ) blend prediction towards 0.5
predict_batch() returns list of predictions
Model save/load roundtrip preserves accuracy
stories.notes: 15 tests in TestUS255TrainingAndPrediction — all pass. Includes early stopping verification and feature count mismatch handling.
